message:
feat(migration): add backward compatibility layer for symbol-native transition

Implement the migration module that enables gradual adoption of the
RaptorQ symbol-native paradigm without breaking existing APIs:
- DualMode trait for types that can operate in both traditional
  message-based and symbol-native modes
- Compatibility adapters that wrap legacy operations with automatic
  symbol conversion when RaptorQ is enabled
- Migration path utilities for converting existing data stores from
  traditional to symbol-native representation incrementally

This addresses the production requirement that existing systems cannot
switch protocols overnight, allowing per-operation opt-in to RaptorQ
encoding while maintaining performance parity on non-RaptorQ paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
